# SurgeonValue

> 9 AI agents that help orthopedic surgeons capture revenue they're already earning but not billing.

## What we do
SurgeonValue scans a surgeon's panel, identifies missed billing codes, generates prior authorization letters, collects patient-reported outcomes, and models episode costs under CMS bundled payment models (TEAM, CJR-X). Physician-attested. Flat fee. AKS compliant.

## Key products
- **Wonder Bill**: Paste an op note, see every code you qualify for but didn't bill. 60 seconds.
- **Prior Auth Agent**: Generates peer-to-peer-ready authorization letters from operative notes. FHIR-compatible.
- **Episode Cost Analyzer**: Models 90-day episode costs against CJR-X target prices.
- **Revenue Scanner**: Panel-wide missed-code identification across RTM, CCM, TCM, ACP, PIN.
- **PROM Collector**: Automated patient-reported outcome collection (PROMIS, HOOS, KOOS).

## Pricing
- Free: Enter NPI, see missed revenue estimate. No login.
- Core: $199/mo + $20/encounter
- Pro: $299/mo + $20/encounter (includes CJR-X episode optimization)
- Enterprise: Custom

## CMS context
- CJR-X (proposed April 10, 2026): First nationwide mandatory episode-based payment for joints. 2,500+ hospitals. 90-day episodes.
- Prior auth reform (proposed April 10, 2026): 24-hour urgent / 72-hour standard PA decision deadlines. FHIR-based electronic submission.

## Technical
- Built on Anthropic Claude (sole frontier model)
- MCP server with 22+ tools (episode cost, billing analysis, prior auth, benchmarks)
- Supabase Auth + Stripe billing
- HIPAA compliant

## Who we are
SurgeonValue is a product of SolvingHealth LLC (Colorado). Founded by Blaine Warkentine, MD — 20+ years in orthopedic technology, grew BrainLAB's orthopedic vertical from $0 to $250M.

## Links
- Website: https://surgeonvalue.com
- CJR-X page: https://surgeonvalue.com/cjr-x
- Parent: https://solvinghealth.com
- Care platform: https://co-op.care
- Advance care planning: https://caregoals.com

## MCP connector
```json
"surgeonvalue": {
  "command": "npx",
  "args": ["-y", "@anthropic-ai/mcp-remote",
    "https://solvinghealth.com/mcp"]
}
```
